creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
This patch is broken in several ways, unit tests fails and .pc-files are broken. Autotools are also deprecated as of 2.2 so we might as well switch to CMake as upstream suggests (https://github.com/libevent/libevent#autoconf).

By accident I missed your PR and submitted a new with a some more testing and notes. https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=271569
